raw_title: As Open Models Spark AI Boom, NVIDIA Jetson Brings It to Life at the Edge
raw_content: The Cat 306 CR mini-excavator weighs just under eight tons and fits inside a standard shipping container. It’s the machine a contractor rents when the job site is tight: a utility trench near a foundation, a basement dig in a dense neighborhood. The cab is roughly the size of a phone booth. The operator sits […]
